title: Visa check: HiKorea sample visa checklist
writtenContent:
Visa check: HiKorea sample visa checklist

Summary
Sample visa source for SENT_TO_TELEGRAM queue validation.
shortSummary: Sample visa source for SENT_TO_TELEGRAM queue validation.
whyItMatters: Visa and stay rules can affect work eligibility, deadlines and required documents.
checkNext:
1. Confirm the latest date on the official page.
2. Match the guidance to your visa type, stay period and employment status.
3. Call 1345 or visit immigration before making legal or visa decisions.
imagePrompt: Clean editorial image for local validation: visa
